hero.title: Your Crown Deserves to Shine
hero.subtitle: Premium mobile car detailing that comes to you — anywhere in Seattle, Bellevue, Kirkland, Redmond, Issaquah and nearby cities.

about.title: Detailing Fit for Royalty
about.body: Crown Shine Mobile Detailing brings a five-star detailing experience directly to your driveway, office, or garage. Every vehicle is treated with meticulous care, premium products, and an obsession for the finest details — because your car deserves nothing less than a crown-level shine.

services.name: Exterior Shine
services.description: A quick, thorough refresh for the driver who wants their car looking sharp on a budget.

services.name: Signature Detail
services.description: Our most popular package — a deep interior and exterior detail for a true crown-level shine.

services.name: Full Royal Detail
services.description: The ultimate transformation — showroom-level correction inside and out.

services.name: Ceramic Coating
services.description: Long-term paint protection with a deep, glass-like gloss that lasts for years.

serviceArea.title: Where We Shine
serviceArea.subtitle: We bring the crown treatment to your location across the Greater Seattle area.

testimonials.name: Stepan Lazarev
testimonials.quote: Came across these guys and they did a great job detailing my 2025 BMW XM. Very detail-oriented — they cleaned every corner of my car inside and out. I definitely recommend and I'll be back. Thank you guys!

testimonials.name: Wendy Davis
testimonials.quote: Wonderful experience. He was very polite, arrived on time, and did a fantastic job. Such a great convenience that he came to me so it didn't disrupt my day — and when he was done my car was spotless and smelled great. You couldn't even tell that my 140 lb dog rides in it every day! Would definitely recommend.

testimonials.name: Olya Svyrydenko
testimonials.quote: Made a birthday present 🎁 to my husband with his car cleaning! It was a great surprise — high-quality work and excellent communication and timing. Thanks!

testimonials.name: Roman Tihon
testimonials.quote: Arthur, I'm very satisfied with your work — everything is cleaned so professionally inside, like it just came straight from the factory. I highly recommend him to anyone who wants their car professionally detailed at home. Quality is the most important thing for me, and that's exactly what he delivers.

testimonials.name: A. Baban
testimonials.quote: I was looking for a detailing service and found Crown Shine Mobile Detailing. This guy is very responsible — he came to my place 10 minutes before the scheduled time and did a great job. A very nice and honest person. Thank you for the precise approach.

gallery.title: Our Work
gallery.subtitle: A glimpse of the crown-level shine we bring to every vehicle.

items.title: We Come To You
items.description: Full mobile setup — we bring everything to your home, office, or garage.

items.title: Fully Insured
items.description: Licensed and insured for total peace of mind on every job.

items.title: Eco-Friendly Products
items.description: Premium, biodegradable products that are tough on grime, gentle on your car.

items.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
items.description: Not happy with the shine? We'll make it right, every time.

items.title: Flexible Scheduling
items.description: Evenings and weekends available to fit your busy schedule.

items.title: 5-Star Rated
items.description: Trusted by hundreds of drivers across the Greater Seattle area.

items.question: Do I need to provide water or electricity?
items.answer: No — our mobile units are fully self-contained with their own water and power, so we can detail your car virtually anywhere.

items.question: How long does a detail take?
items.answer: Most appointments run 1–5 hours depending on the package and your vehicle's size and condition. Exact durations are listed with each package.

items.question: What payment methods do you accept?
items.answer: We currently accept payment in person after your service is complete — cash, card, or contactless tap are all welcome.

items.question: How far in advance should I book?
items.answer: We recommend booking a few days ahead, especially for weekend slots, but we'll always do our best to accommodate last-minute requests.

items.question: What if it's raining on my appointment day?
items.answer: Light rain isn't a problem for interior details or garage/covered locations. For exterior work in heavy rain, we'll reach out to reschedule at no extra cost.

items.question: Do you offer packages for multiple vehicles or fleets?
items.answer: Yes! Contact us directly and we'll put together a custom quote for multiple vehicles or recurring fleet service.

footer.tagline: Luxury mobile detailing across the Greater Seattle area.
